title: pilosella prussica subsp. elatior
intro: Pilosella prussica subsp. elatior is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pilosella prussica subsp. elatior include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and other health problems.
